name: admin-sig-leak-prevention
rationale: Clean intake; standard prelim review draft generated. F4.SL sweep ensures broker-facing outbound emails do NOT contain Vienna's internal admin signatures, mock-data markers, or test-fixture artifacts (e.g., 'Vienna' boilerplate signoffs leaking from generator templates, mock placeholder values like 'XXX-XXX-XXXX'). Negative-assertion scenario: verify these patterns are ABSENT in outbound.
notes: Single-event sequence. F4.SL is well-trodden well-anchored singleton in matrix per Phase 1 — assertion-thoroughness compensates for single-scenario coverage.
